channel.title: Rebel Studios Software Blog
channel.description: Insights on security, AI, and software engineering from Rebel Studios Software.

item.title: The Architecture of Apology: Why Groups Take Decades to Admit What Individuals See in Minutes
item.description: Why corporations and societies take decades to reverse mistakes that individuals admit in minutes — cognitive dissonance, institutional inertia, and the architecture of apology.

item.title: The "Noble Lie": Can Disinformation Ever Be Used for Good?
item.description: From pool-dye myths to acne-toothbrush hoaxes — can disinformation ever be used for good, and what is the hidden cost of the noble lie?

item.title: When Your AI Starts Spending Your Money: x402 and the Agentic Economy
item.description: HTTP 402 was reserved for a future that's finally arriving: AI agents paying for things on their own. Here's what the x402 agentic economy actually means for consumers — the convenience, and the catch.

item.title: The Google Ecosystem Splinter: Why Developers Are Drowning in Separate Consoles
item.description: Why Google splits Cloud, Firebase, Play Console, AdMob, and AdSense into separate consoles — and what developers can do about it.

item.title: The Serious Business of Having Fun: Why Play is Your Best Performance Hack
item.description: Why play is a biological necessity and the best performance hack for software engineers and creative professionals.

item.title: The Perfectionism Trap: Why Software Engineers Must Shift Their Metric of Success
item.description: Software engineers must shift from perfection to progress. Why unshipped code is the ultimate failure and how to measure success differently.

item.title: The Scamdemic: How Modern Fraud is Eroding Trust and Killing Innovation
item.description: How modern fraud — pig butchering, AI voice clones, and crypto scams — erodes trust and kills innovation.

item.title: How to Build a Picture Messaging App: Kotlin, Compose, and Firebase
item.description: Step-by-step guide to building a picture messaging app with Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Firebase, FCM, and CameraX — from Android Studio to Google Play.

item.title: How to Build a SaaS Platform: Next.js, Stripe, Prisma, and AI
item.description: Build a SaaS platform with Next.js, Prisma, Turso, NextAuth, Stripe subscriptions, Claude AI, and Railway deployment.

item.title: The Ghost in the Machine: True Randomness and the Case for Free Will
item.description: True randomness, quantum indeterminism, and the philosophical case for free will in an age of deterministic AI.

item.title: The Automation Trap: What the Great Depression Teaches Us About the AI Revolution
item.description: What the Great Depression teaches us about the AI revolution, job displacement, and building a future that works for everyone.

item.title: Beyond the Code: The Hidden Developer Superpowers Driving the AI Era
item.description: The hidden developer superpowers driving the AI era: communication, systems thinking, and collaborating with imperfect tools.

item.title: The Critical Importance of IoT Security
item.description: Why IoT security matters: default credentials, invisible network behavior, real-world breaches, and behavioral anomaly detection.
